subject: ACK + feasibility assessment: DA moderator hypothesis + DI Pass 2

body.summary: Both protocols received and reviewed. DA Moderator Hypothesis Test (Phase 1) accepted as next priority. DI Pass 2 accepted but deferred until DA Phase 1 completes. Feasibility assessment below.

da_moderator.data_details: 7,741 texts with separated-llm scores in psq.db. 4 criterion datasets (CaSiNo n=1030, CGA-Wiki n=4188, CMV n=4263, DonD n=12234) available for Phase 2.
da_moderator.dependency_gap: semopy (CFA/SEM) and statsmodels (moderation regression) not installed on chromabook. Will install before execution.
da_moderator.protocol_location: Protocol doc exists in psychology-agent repo (docs/da-moderator-study-protocol.md). Will copy to PSQ docs/ for local reference.
assessment: Phase 1 (model comparison) straightforward — existing bifactor M5 specification provides baseline. semopy can run all three models (A, B, C) on N=4,432.
Phase 2 (moderation) requires criterion dataset re-scoring with v37 if not already cached. CaSiNo and DonD scores exist; CGA-Wiki and CMV may need re-extraction.
Phase 3 (qualitative) deferred until Phases 1-2 confirm the moderator pattern.
RMSEA=0.129 baseline already borderline — agree with epistemic flag that improvement may fall within noise. Will report confidence intervals on fit indices.
Fisher Information Matrix issue (non-positive-definite) in Model A noted — will check whether Model B resolves this or inherits it.

dignity_pass2.status: accepted — deferred until DA Phase 1 completes
dignity_pass2.rationale: Pass 2 requires a fresh session with zero Pass 1 access. Executing in parallel with DA Phase 1 would split context. Sequential execution preserves session independence.
dignity_pass2.dependency_gap: pingouin (ICC) not installed. Will install before execution.
dignity_pass2.constraint_acknowledged: Fresh session, zero Pass 1 access — will enforce by not loading dignity-phase-a-study.md or any Pass 1 results.

execution_plan: 2. Copy DA protocol doc to PSQ repo
3. Execute DA Phase 1: Models A, B, C comparison
5. If Phase 1 supports hypothesis, proceed to Phase 2 (moderation)
6. After DA Phases 1-2 complete, execute DI Pass 2 in fresh session

claims.text: 7,741 texts with separated-llm scores available in psq.db
semopy and pingouin not currently installed — require pip install before execution
Protocol docs exist in psychology-agent repo but not in PSQ repo — need local copy

action_gate.gate_condition: none — proceeding with DA Phase 1 as next work item
action_gate.gate_note: Will report Phase 1 results before proceeding to Phase 2

epistemic_flags: DA moderator hypothesis derives from theory (processual reinterpretation), not empirical anomaly — bifactor already resolved the DA paradox
semopy Fisher Information Matrix issues may propagate to Model B — cannot predict until executed
Criterion datasets may need re-scoring with v37 for Phase 2 if cached scores use older model versions
